use_cases: Navigation menus with expandable options for hierarchical content
Action dropdowns for triggering contextual operations like edit, delete, or share
User account menus with profile, settings, and logout options
Filter and sorting menus in data tables or product listings
Theme or display preference toggles in application settings
ai_summary: A reusable dropdown menu component built on Radix UI primitives featuring customizable button variants with multiple styles and sizes. Supports hover states, keyboard navigation, and click-to-reveal interactions for displaying contextual options or navigation links. Includes slot composition for flexible icon placement and loading states.
